title: Love List

body:
Supplies: Surrounded Paper || Fiskars Fingertip Craft Knife || American Crafts Cardstock || Hello font

On the Love List right now:

1. Finishing this book - Someone Could Get Hurt: A Memoir of Twenty-First-Century Parenthood, which I highly recommend for both a good cry in the beginning and laughs throughout. 2. Long dresses for days. Like literally I have been wearing them every single day. 3. Feeling a good amount of energy. 4. Getting closer to closing on our house... we had a setback and it's not happening next week, but I'm practicing patience. And advising people to stay on top of their credit reports - mistakes on those are the biggest pain in the tush. 5.The fact that you all love washi tape too. 6.Our classes at Paper Tales next week are filling up! Only a couple spots left. 7. Still being able to paint my own nails. 8. My new Canon SELPHY CP900 Wireless Photo Printer- more details on why it's awesome to come on Monday. 9. Laying on my side for prenatal massages. 10. 100 more days to go! Oh boy.
